name: CALIFORNIA FIRST LEASING CORP
summary: California First National Bancorp is a bank holding company headquartered in Orange County, California, operating through CalFirst Bank and CalFirst Leasing. The company provides secured financing through equipment leasing, syndicated commercial loans, non-recourse loans secured by leases and equipment, and direct commercial loans. CalFirst Bank gathers deposits via the Internet and operates from one central location, focusing on capital assets including high-tech systems, medical equipment, manufacturing equipment, and transportation assets.

products.name: Equipment Leasing
products.description: Non-cancelable net leases for capital assets including computers, medical equipment, manufacturing systems, and transportation equipment.

products.name: Syndicated Commercial Loans
products.description: Participation in leveraged and non-leveraged syndicated commercial loan market.

products.name: Non-Recourse Loans
products.description: Loans to third parties secured by leases and equipment on a non-recourse basis.

products.name: Direct Commercial Loans
products.description: Direct commercial lending to businesses and organizations across the United States.

products.name: Internet Deposit Gathering
products.description: CalFirst Bank gathers deposits by posting rates on the Internet from one central location.
